sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10455" key="a)ntirre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιρρέω</orth>, <sense id="n10455.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flow</tr_> or (of wind) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blow contrariwise,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
